title: meliosma pinnata subsp. ferruginea
intro: Meliosma pinnata subsp. ferruginea, also known as the Ferrugineous Meliosma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Alangiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Meliosma pinnata subsp. ferruginea include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
